action.reasoning: Observation: Best worst_region=0.4666 from 3 epochs with mild augmentation. 10 epochs with strong augmentation gave 0.4501 - worse. Analysis: Need to (1) use milder augmentation, (2) train longer with proper schedule, (3) consider region-aware sampling to boost Africa. Decision: Train 15 epochs from scratch with mild augmentation and region-balanced sampling.
